# region_from_zone (Function)

Given a zone string value, returns the region that contains the zone.

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
region_from_zone(zone string) string
```

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `zone` (String) zone to extract the region from (e.g. fr-par-1)
